items.title: SAP reports Q2 cloud revenue up 22% YoY to €6.28B, vs. €6.26B est., total revenue up 9.4% to €9.88B, and lowers its 2026 non-IFRS operating profit guidance (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: SAP reports Q2 cloud revenue up 22% YoY to €6.28B, vs. €6.26B est., total revenue up 9.4% to €9.88B, and lowers its 2026 non-IFRS operating profit guidance (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_zh: SAP 报告称，第二季度云收入同比增长 22% 至 €6.28B，而预期为 €6.26B，总收入增长 9.4% 至 €9.88B，并降低了 2026 年非 IFRS 营业利润指引（Grace Yoon/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: SAP 报告称，第二季度云收入同比增长 22% 至 €6.28B，而预期为 €6.26B，总收入增长 9.4% 至 €9.88B，并降低了 2026 年非 IFRS 营业利润指引（Grace Yoon/华尔街日报） / SAP reports Q2 cloud revenue up 22% YoY to €6.28B, vs. €6.26B est., total revenue up 9.4% to €9.88B, and lowers its 2026 non-IFRS operating profit guidance (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

items.title: Tesla stock closed down 14.52% and Alphabet closed down 6.89% after they signaled increased AI spending, amid worries about the mounting costs of the AI boom (Arjun Kharpal/CNBC)

items.title_zh: 由于担心人工智能热潮成本不断上升，特斯拉股价收盘下跌 14.52%，Alphabet 股价收盘下跌 6.89%，此前他们表示将增加人工智能支出（Arjun Kharpal/CNBC）

items.title: STMicro forecasts Q3 revenue up ~16% YoY to $3.7B, below $3.79B est., and expects AI sales to pass $1B in 2026 and be "well above $2B" in 2027; STM falls 14%+ (Christina Kyriasoglou/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: STMicro forecasts Q3 revenue up ~16% YoY to $3.7B, below $3.79B est., and expects AI sales to pass $1B in 2026 and be "well above $2B" in 2027; STM falls 14%+ (Christina Kyriasoglou/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: STMicro forecasts Q3 revenue up ~16% YoY to $3.7B, below $3.79B est., and expects AI sales to pass $1B in 2026 and be "well above $2B" in 2027; STM falls 14%+ (Christina Kyriasoglou/Bloomberg)
